scripts.build:mp-weixin: cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_LOCAL_DEBUG_LOGIN=true VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://192.168.3.22:3001/api VITE_UPLOAD_URL=http://192.168.3.22:3001/api/upload UNI_INPUT_DIR=. uni build -p mp-weixin --mode development --outDir dist/dev/mp-weixin
scripts.build:mp-weixin:release: npm run check:release && cross-env NODE_ENV=production UNI_INPUT_DIR=. uni build -p mp-weixin --outDir dist/build/mp-weixin
